'''gazodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enbucrilate|enbucrilate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enbucrilate|enbucrilate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzedheth|gæzedheth]] || [[word:gæzedhej|gæzedhej]] || [[word:gæzedhesh|gæzedhesh]] || [[word:gæzedhe|gæzedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazozodhoth|gazozodhoth]] || [[word:gazozodhoj|gazozodhoj]] || [[word:gazozodhosh|gazozodhosh]] || [[word:gazozodho|gazozodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazodhoth|gazodhoth]] || [[word:gazodhoj|gazodhoj]] || [[word:gazodhosh|gazodhosh]] || [[word:gazodho|gazodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazofdhoth|gazofdhoth]] || [[word:gazofdhoj|gazofdhoj]] || [[word:gazofdhosh|gazofdhosh]] || [[word:gazofdhof|gazofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazodhotho|gazodhotho]] || [[word:gazodhojo|gazodhojo]] || [[word:gazodhosho|gazodhosho]] || [[word:gazodhoko|gazodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazodhoth|gazodhoth]] || [[word:gazodhoj|gazodhoj]] || [[word:gazodhosh|gazodhosh]] || [[word:gazodho|gazodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazodhothol|gazodhothol]] || [[word:gazodhojol|gazodhojol]] || [[word:gazodhoshol|gazodhoshol]] || [[word:gazodhokol|gazodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazodhothotho|gazodhothotho]] || [[word:gazodhojojo|gazodhojojo]] || [[word:gazodhoshosho|gazodhoshosho]] || [[word:gazodhoko|gazodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazodhothon|gazodhothon]] || [[word:gazodhojon|gazodhojon]] || [[word:gazodhoshon|gazodhoshon]] || [[word:gazodhokon|gazodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazodhothoro|gazodhothoro]] || [[word:gazodhojoro|gazodhojoro]] || [[word:gazodhoshoro|gazodhoshoro]] || [[word:gazodhokoro|gazodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
